prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ZAK-ZAKTACTICALKEYRINGHOLDER-2 Product Type: UTILITY_HOLSTER_POUCH Brand (from catalog): Zak Tool Existing Title: Zak Tool ZT54 Tactical Keyring Holder Belt Clip - 2 Pack Description: This Zak Tool Key Ring Holder was designed for law enforcement to have easy and quick access to their tools and handcuff keys.

Ideal for keeping handcuff keys accessible on duty belts up to 1.75" wide. Search Terms: duty keeper belt loop service key chain holder civil service correction officer key clip gaurd Features: - Black Powder Coat Finish - Easy One Hand Operation - Heavy-Duty Construction - Reliable and Secure Positive Retention - Manufacturer Lifetime Guarantee | Made in the USA === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Zak Tool 2-Pack Black Tactical Keyring Holder Belt Clip

openai.item_name: Zak Tool 2-pk Black Tactical Keyring Holder Belt Clip

anthropic.title_differentiation: Law Enforcement Grade, One Hand Operation, Heavy-Duty Construction, Secure Positive Retention, USA Made, Lifetime Guarantee

openai.title_differentiation: Easy One-Hand Access, Secure Positive Retention, Fits 175" Duty Belts, Heavy-Duty Build, Made In USA
